ops.title: PLF-09: codex-ask quota/auth preflight probe
ops.description: Audit verdict needs-judgment: quota/auth outages waste whole fan-out lanes (2026-07-21 usage-limit incident + 2026-07-22 token revocation), but the naive probe hangs ~13 min, so the design needs a fast-fail (strict timeout, cheap endpoint) before it helps. Belongs in plugins/codex (guarded plugin — coordinate with in-flight codex work; ships via a codex release). Sketch: codex-ask preflight before dispatch/mint-root — auth + quota check with a hard 10s timeout; on failure write PREFLIGHT_FAILED status to the run/root dir so callers reroute to Claude lanes instantly instead of dispatching N doomed lanes.

ops.text: preflight completes or fails within 10s wall-clock in both healthy and revoked-token states
a fan-out mint against a dead codex account yields PREFLIGHT_FAILED without dispatching any lane
shipped via a codex plugin release; verify-plugin-version green
